changes.description: File walker with pathlib.rglob, SHA-256 content hashing, .gitignore filtering via fnmatch, default skip patterns (__pycache__, .git, .cnogo, node_modules, .venv, .tox)
Python AST parser extracting SymbolInfo (function/class/method with signatures, decorators), ImportInfo (absolute/relative), CallInfo (with receiver), TypeRef, heritage tuples, __all__ exports
Structure phase creating FILE and FOLDER nodes with CONTAINS edges using PurePosixPath for platform-independent path handling
16 tests covering discovery, hashing, default skip patterns, gitignore filtering
27 tests covering functions, classes, methods, imports, calls, heritage, types, exports, error handling
10 tests covering file nodes, folder nodes, CONTAINS edges, nested trees
